content: {"comments":[{"file":"src/services/auth.ts","line":42,"message":"JWT secret is loaded from environment at module scope. If `AUTH_JWT_SECRET` is unset, this throws at import time rather than at first use. Consider lazy initialization or a startup validation step.","severity":"warning"},{"file":"src/middleware/auth.ts","line":18,"message":"The token expiry check uses `Date.now()` which returns milliseconds, but `exp` in JWT claims is in seconds. This will cause all tokens to appear valid. Divide by 1000.","severity":"error"},{"file":"src/repositories/user.ts","line":67,"message":"Good use of parameterized queries here — this prevents SQL injection on the email lookup.","severity":"info"},{"file":"src/services/auth.ts","line":89,"message":"The bcrypt cost factor is hardcoded to 10. Consider extracting this to a config constant so it can be tuned per environment.","severity":"warning"}]}
